calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-02-2024 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Notice having been given and there being no appearance or objection filed, the Court orders the case dismissed pursuant to Government Code 68608(b). The court finds no good cause or substantial justification for failure to comply with the previous court orders. A less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance. Judge: Anne-Christine Massullo; Clerk: M. Macadangdang; Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-30-2024 Continued To Jul-02-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Self-represented Plaintiff is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order to Show Cause is re-set to July 02, 2024, at 10:30am in Department 610. Judge: Garret L. Wong; Clerk: M. Macadangdang; Proceedings not reported. (610)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-26-2024 Set For Order To Show Cause On Apr-30-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-04-2024 Continued To Mar-20-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
